spot_checks.name: dealInitial deals 2+2 with dealer hole face-down
placeBet 100 + resolve win = +100 net from starting 1000
index.html script tag order
spot_checks.detail: order=[rules-engine.js, bankroll.js, ui-render.js, controller.js], inline DOMContentLoaded bootstrapper count=1

summary: Existing edge-case test runner reproduced 14/14 passing with exit code 0. All 6 independent spot-checks against the integrated artifact in output/integration/ also passed: rules engine creates a 312-card betting state, dealInitial produces 2+2 cards with dealer's hole card face-down, bankroll math is correct for win (+100 net) and blackjack (3:2 payout, balance=1150), soft-ace handling correctly downgrades A+7+5 from soft 18 to hard 13, and index.html loads scripts in the required order (rules-engine, bankroll, ui-render, controller) with a single inline DOMContentLoaded bootstrapper. Integration is functionally sound.
